title: Visit to Install App
excerpt:
Hi Team, 
We represent Sprite Software. We’ve developed an integration application for Monday.com and FreshService available in the FreshService marketplace. However, customers browsing the Monday.com marketplace current…

posts.author: balanagendra (balanagendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

We represent Sprite Software. We’ve developed an integration application for Monday.com and FreshService available in the FreshService marketplace. However, customers browsing the Monday.com marketplace currently cannot see this integration app. To address this, I aim to create an application within Monday.com that prompts users to visit and install the application, similar to the screenshot below.

The primary goal is to seamlessly redirect customers from the Monday.com Marketplace to the FreshService Marketplace. Is it possible to publish the application like this?

image1920×947 100 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The monday.com marketplace application will have to provide some actual functionality of its own that does something to get approved.

Since Freshworks has not created an integration for Freshservice, only Freshdesk, you may be able to implement a monday.com app that integrates Freshservice?

This would do much of what your existing app does, but maybe from the other direction so that events in monday.com can trigger changes in Freshservice? (The monday app could also get webhooks from Freshservice and make changes in monday.)

But to get published the monday app would need to include recipes the users could add to their boards that actually integrate with Freshservice - not just a redirect to Freshservice side integration.

posts.author: balanagendra (balanagendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is the link Freshserive & Monday.com integration: Freshworks Freshservice & Monday.com Integration Integration | Freshworks Marketplace.

We already implemented Freshservice and Monday.com integration in the Freshservice marketplace. You can see this in the below screenshot and the above link.

Again, we don’t want to implement the same solution in the Monday.com marketplace. Because it will take more time.

We just want to redirect the customer from Monday.com Marketplace to FreshService Marketplace to install the applications.

image1920×914 89.9 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You will not get an app listed in the monday.com marketplace that doesn’t contain actual functionality for monday.com itself. Its a policy, and they haven’t waived it for anyone. There isn’t a redirection feature either and I wouldn’t anticipate them ever directing people off the platform they control.
